features.name: Guided lab frontend shell
features.description: Factory-backed curriculum surface and guided lab workbench UI (editor, PTY terminal, three-pane layout) plus related dashboard static wiring. Owned by another worker; this checkout must not edit frontend/ or waku/ops/static/.
verification: On the UI branch: make frontend-check (pnpm typecheck + build) when frontend/ is present.
On the UI branch: relevant UI/orchestrator contract tests green.
Merge into scale without regressing make lint, make eval, make harness-test.
evidence: Sibling worktree at treehouse pool path carries commits through Document tag-fetch requirement and worktree support in AGENTS.md (12aae69) atop guided-lab workbench backend/frontend WIP.
ADRs on UI branch: docs/adr/0005-sandbox-learning-labs.md, docs/adr/0006-guided-lab-workbench.md; compose.yaml and frontend/ present there but not on bare origin/scale.
Bare origin/scale (1c6cecb) has no frontend/, compose.yaml, or Dockerfile — UI work is not landed here yet.
features.notes: External ownership. Do not touch frontend/ or waku/ops/static/ from harness or curriculum agents while this is in_progress.

features.name: Root agent-harness kit
features.description: Durable state artifacts and one-command setup so autonomous coding loops can restart from disk: AGENTS.md, feature_list.json, progress.md, session-handoff.md, init.sh, with CLAUDE.md pointing at AGENTS.md.
verification: ./init.sh from the worktree root (and ideally from another cwd).
make lint && make eval && make harness-test
Fresh read of feature_list.json + session-handoff.md is enough to know active work and next action.
evidence: 2026-07-18: harness kit added on branch fm/waku-harness-g1 based on origin/scale.
Commands actually run green on this worktree: make lint; make eval (58 passed, 5 skipped); make harness-test (13 passed); make check-00 (1 passed); ./scripts/session-init.sh.
Methodology shape ported from autonomy harness + learn-harness-engineering + loop-engineering (goal/stop/checker/budget/state/dogfood/handoff) sized to waku-agent.
features.notes: Completed by crewmate waku-harness-g1. CLAUDE.md is a symlink or thin pointer to AGENTS.md.
